intent: Log into the secure area and confirm the success message is shown.
step: Read the confirmation banner after logging in
observed_behavior: A banner appeared with a coloured background and a small 'x' close icon, reading 'You logged into a secure area!'.
agent_reasoning: The banner has an alert-style coloured background and a dismiss button, which often signals an error.
dom_excerpt: You logged into a secure area!x
